title: rubus fruticosus var. hybridus
intro: Rubus fruticosus var. hybridus, also known as the black raspberry, is a type of bramble plant that is a hybrid of the native black raspberry (Rubus occidentalis) and the introduced European raspberry (Rubus idaeus). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. The health benefits of Rubus fruticosus var. hybridus include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. Rubus fruticosus var. hybridus can be prepared as a herbal supplement, tea, or tincture, and is also used in jams, jellies, and other food products.
